case_title: JEFFREY KNOTT VS. SKINNY LABS INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-14-23 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DERREK KO (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED DEC-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SKINNY LABS INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KNOTT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SKINNY LABS INC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DERREK KO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
